annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under 14 M.R.S. §1602-C, currently 9.51% (as of January 1, 2026). The weekly-average one-year Treasury constant maturity yield (Fed H.15) for the last full week of the prior calendar year, plus 6 percentage points, fixed for the year. For… Simple interest. Contract or note actions with an interest provision use the greater of the contract rate or the statutory Treasury-plus-6 rate; all other actions use… Verify the current value at legislature.maine.gov; not legal advice.
